raw_response: Given your price sensitivity and budget constraints, the ASUS ZenBook 14 offers remarkable value for under $900. Its OLED display provides excellent visual quality, ideal for data analysis tasks. Despite its less powerful Intel Core Ultra 5 processor compared to competitors, it still delivers decent performance. The laptop's lightweight design and long battery life make it portable and convenient for daily use. While the speakers are weak and RAM is fixed at 16GB without upgrade options, this model remains a solid choice within your budget constraints.
